name: i_sheets_shopify_decline_pivot_to_sheets
notes: The paced post-profile flow's easiest-first offer is always Shopify for a fresh tenant (agent_data_needs.next_best_integration ranks by effort — Shopify=1, Sheets=2, and sales_recovery's plan_requires is identical across both, so effort ASC always picks Shopify first). When the owner explicitly declines Shopify by name and states their data is in a Google Sheet, the system must pivot honestly toward Sheets (never claim Shopify got connected anyway). Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` (mirrors mind_change_integration.json's setup — the readiness ask resolves into the Shopify offer on turn 1) then `script <tenant> i_sheets_shopify_decline_pivot_to_sheets.json`.

steps.note: Resolves the readiness ask into the easiest-first integration offer (Shopify).

steps.message: I don't use Shopify, my customer and sales data is all in a Google Sheet instead
steps.note: Mind-change away from the offered Shopify connector toward Sheets (which, unlike Amazon in mind_change_integration.json, IS a real built connector) — expect an honest pivot toward Sheets (e.g. the real authorize_url or the registry's 'reply sheet' instructions), never a fabricated Shopify connection.
